title: arabis sagittata subsp. planisiliqua
intro: Arabis sagittata subsp. planisiliqua is a subspecies of the Arabis sagittata plant, also known as the 'arrow-leafed rock-cress' or 'arrow-leaved rock cress', which is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The medicinal properties of Arabis sagittata subsp. planisiliqua include its ability to act as a diuretic, and its leaves have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help with urinary tract problems, and its leaves may have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Arabis sagittata subsp. planisiliqua is typically prepared as a herbal tea, and its leaves can also be used in infusions or as a dried powder in capsules.
